name: StackLead
long_description:
StackLead automatically analyzes sales leads. 

Starting with only an email address, we pull together all the research a sales rep needs to understand a lead and their business. With this information, sales teams close more deals because they can effectively tailor their messaging and they don't have to spend time manually researching every new lead.

You can access StackLead research wherever you need it. If you already have an internal email when a user signs up, you can forward it to StackLead and we'll reply with a complete research report. We also provide a Salesforce integration (stacklead.com/blog/qualifying-leads-in-salesforce-with-stacklead/) and webhooks API (stacklead.com/docs).

Get started at stacklead.com or contact us at team@stacklead.com
one_liner: Lead intelligence as a service. We want to be your personal lead…

name: WorkRamp
long_description: WorkRamp is the All-in-One Learning Platform that your executives, employees, and customers will love. WorkRamp advances learning as a growth engine for your business with a flexible platform that empowers teams to develop top talent, exceed revenue targets, and inspire customers to become advocates. With a flexible, All-in-One Learning Platform, WorkRamp redefines the LMS for the modern workplace to help executives recognize learning as a growth engine and one of the most strategic investments an organization can make. See why top learning teams at Box, Outreach, and Reddit trust WorkRamp to drive business outcomes and organizational scale.
one_liner: The All-in-One Learning Platform

name: Circa
long_description: Circa is the event marketing platform built for demand gen and field marketing teams. We help sales and marketing teams work on events, everywhere and every way their customers gather.
one_liner: Event marketing CRM

name: BlitzIQ
one_liner: Note taking workspace for B2B sales teams

name: Quickcard
long_description: We help our customers build sales documents that are personalized, actionable, and beautiful. Our platform is self-serve friendly and replaces outdated email attachments.
one_liner: Dynamic sales materials that shape-shift based on the customers needs

name: Warmly,
long_description:
Step 1: We find you warm leads: contacts + companies that are showing interest on your website (via 6sense/Clearbit) and researching you around the web (via Bombora) but haven't converted yet.

Step 2: We then auto follow up via chat, email or LinkedIn. Depends what workflows you want to set up - we can AI chat with them on your website, auto AI email them via your sequence provider of choice, and/or auto AI linkedin sequence them. Your humans can verify everything before being sent too. 

Outcome: 10x more outbound than a human SDR, 3x reply rates since they're warm and more booked meetings (results shown in ROI dashboard). 

P.S. if you want to use humans: you can send 1-click warm intro requests via your network or live chat/video call them too.

This is the power of an autonomous sales orchestration platform and we have 100+ paying customers who can back it up.
one_liner: Autonomous sales platform to auto-email your warmest leads

name: Pragmatic Leaders (Ankai Inc)
long_description:
Ostronaut is an AI-powered, SaaS-based corporate training solution built to transform workforce learning. Its foundations come from six years of training 10,000+ product professionals through Pragmatic Leaders, which provided a faster, more cost-effective alternative to an MBA.

🚀 Smarter, faster, and designed for real-world impact.

- Initiative of Pragmatic Leaders
one_liner: AI-powered Corporate Training: Faster, Smarter, and More Effective

name: FirstQuadrant
long_description:
FirstQuadrant helps revenue teams move faster, stay organized, and close more deals, by streamlining the behind-the-scenes sales-work so nothing ever slips through the cracks.

In October 2025, FirstQuadrant Inc. completed a confidential agreement with a leading AI technology company that recognized long-term strategic value in components of the FirstQuadrant platform and data infrastructure and sunset the platform.
one_liner: Sales AI that helps revenue teams move faster and close more deals.

name: Geostar
long_description: Geostar is a platform that helps you generate more inbound revenue from AI search. Monitor your brand's AI visibility and get actionable insights to improve your search rankings.
one_liner: Geostar drives inbound for companies through search.

name: Coast
long_description: The first AI-powered demo platform designed to sell, market and implement technical products with ease. Our visual platform makes APIs more accessible and accelerates commercialization, enabling high-impact digital transformation for the world’s largest enterprises.
one_liner: Demo Platform for API-First Companies

name: Crew
long_description:
Crew is the next-gen ATS/CRM built just for recruiting agencies and independent recruiters. 

It’s all about modern sourcing, packed with cool automation and even a dash of AI. It's beautiful and well-designed. Plus, it’s deeply integrated with LinkedIn—because let’s be honest, that’s where we recruiters hang out most of the day. With Crew, you can forget about all that tedious copying/pasting, and tab-switching, making your workday a whole lot smoother.
one_liner: Next Gen ATS/CRM for Modern Recruitment Agencies

name: SilkChart
long_description: SilkChart analyzes sales calls and measures how well playbooks are executed. It proactively surfaces coaching opportunities to managers, and provides reps with actionable feedback to close more deals.
one_liner: AI Sales Assistant to increase playbook adoption and win more deals

name: CoffeeAI
all_locations: Auckland, Auckland, New Zealand; Auckland, New Zealand
long_description:
Send targeted emails and LinkedIn messages that are as unique as the person receiving it. At scale.

📈 2x your response rates
Every aspect of your outbound email - from the pitch and opener to the call-to-action - is personalized.

Our AI uses trillions of bytes of data to create a deep understanding of your prospects to brew up the perfect message.

📨 Fully tailored in 10 seconds
Still spending 10 minutes researching a prospect? 🥱
CoffeeAI does your research for you - we use tons of different sources of information to create an email that feels unique and thought out.

Let us do the boring stuff so you can focus on building relationships - Or grab a coffee ☕
one_liner: Instant, hyper-personalized, AI-powered outreach messages

name: Criya
long_description:
Criya AI, a Y Combinator and venture backed AI startup is an intelligent content system that reads across all your data sources and in 1-click produces stunning, hyper-personalized client-ready assets, by combining research, branding, authoring and engagement analytics.

Our AI Prospector replaces 85% of your account based marketing effort in 60 seconds. From market research to email/linkedin campaigns and landing page pitch decks, personalized for your specific buyer, we do it all in 1-click.
one_liner: AI that builds GTM assets in seconds

name: SuperSend
long_description: Super Send is a powerful outreach automation platform designed to streamline and scale your prospecting efforts across multiple channels, including email, LinkedIn, and Twitter. With features like dynamic personalization, email warming, inbox rotation, and advanced analytics, Super Send enables businesses to connect with leads efficiently while maintaining a human touch. Whether you’re running A/B tests, managing campaigns, or optimizing deliverability, Super Send provides the tools you need to maximize engagement and grow your business
one_liner: Super Send automates personalized outreach across email, LinkedIn,…

name: Kenobi
long_description:
Kenobi is personalizing the internet. Your marketing site is your front desk to the internet, but its content has to be applicable to all of your ICPs and potential visitors, usually resulting in fragmented and blunt brochure content.

Kenobi acts as your concierge, ensuring each of your visitors receives content that is tailored to _them_ so that they actually convert and progress along your sales journey. You can install Kenobi with one `<head />` tag in your site's markup -- everything else is taken care of using our AI research + content generation pipeline.
one_liner: Personalize your landing site for each vistor, in one line of code.

name: Truva
long_description: Truva handles the busywork intelligently saving your sales team hours each week, so they can focus on what matters most - building and closing deals. Many teams have seen up to 25% increase in sales where Truva's AI agents automated tedious tasks such as email follow up, CRM data entry, and process optimizations.
one_liner: Sell more. Grind less with AI agents.

name: Boundo
long_description: Boundo uses generative AI to replace SDRs. Tell our platform who you're looking for, and it will find and contact high quality sales leads in a fully automated way! We’ve tuned our models to write near-human outbound sales emails with proven conversion. Best of all, we're using our own tool to do all of our sales.
one_liner: Using generative AI to 10x outbound sales, all on autopilot!

name: Capix
long_description: Capix makes finding private equity firms fast and accurate by aggregating and enriching data from multiple sources into one customizable platform.
one_liner: AI-powered private equity intelligence.

name: Sameday
long_description: Sameday is the AI workforce for the trades — outperforming humans at high-stakes, revenue-critical work, such as sales, dispatch, and more.
one_liner: The leading AI workforce for the trades.

name: Gluetrail
long_description:
Gluetrail is a chrome extension that allows you to create support/training/marketing assets 10x faster, just from a screen and audio recording. These assets allow you to drive software or process adoption & awareness among prospects, customers or teammates.  

From one single recording, Gluetrail leverages your screen+clicks+audio transcript, and AI, to:
- automatically create step-by-step articles with screenshots and videos
- adapt the content for & publish it on 3rd party platforms in 1 click: internal or external knowledge bases (Notion, Confluence, Intercom, Zendesk...), community platforms and social media (linkedin, youtube, twitter, discourse...)
one_liner: Create step by step articles with screenshots and videos 10x faster

name: Hindsight
long_description:
Hindsight's AI helps teams understand why they win or lose deals - and use that insight to win more.

Our platform is used by teams like Ironclad, LaunchDarkly, and Klaviyo to build workflows on top of their GTM data.

1. Build battlecards, objection handling guides, and case studies that never go out of date
2. Create AI roleplays based on real conversations your sales team is having
3. Analyze 1000s of deals to create reports and alerts for your GTM, product, and strategy teams.
one_liner: Deal Intelligence and Sales Coaching Platform

name: Hyperbound
long_description:
Hyperbound is the leading enterprise-first Revenue Activation Platform, pioneering a new category focused on turning insights into revenue-driving actions. Hyperbound AI analyzes thousands of sales calls to identify the behaviors that lead to closed-won deals, then transforms those insights into realistic, highly customizable human-like roleplays with AI buyers that drive behavior change at scale.

Trusted by enterprises like IBM, LinkedIn, Monday.com, Bloomberg, Vanta, Autodesk, and G2, Hyperbound helps revenue teams ramp 50% faster, define what good looks like, and scale top performance across thousands of reps.

Interested in trying it out today? Start a free demo simulation at https://app.hyperbound.ai/buyers and book time with our team to learn more.
one_liner: Revenue Activation Platform

name: Speck
long_description: Speck helps professionals in back-to-back calls on their meeting tasks. It automates pre-call research, listens to every word, learns, and creates meeting notes, follow-ups, action items based on how you do them.
one_liner: AI Notetaker that automates all your admin work

name: Scout
long_description: Scout is an AI insights tool for consumer products companies to increase topline revenue. It ingests data from retailer portals and syndicated sources (such as SPINS, NielsenIQ), and tell sales teams exactly where they can grow. Brands use Scout to figure out which accounts to expand, which SKUs to prioritize, and which promotions drove incremental sales.
one_liner: AI insights for consumer products

name: crmCopilot
long_description:
crmCopilot – Stop with the grunt work. Spend more time with customers.

Are you juggling multiple accounts and conversations? Are you worried about missing follow-ups or letting opportunities fall through the cracks? Are you spending hours every week updating your CRM… but still struggle with duplicates, stale data, and unreliable reports? Does just thinking about Salesforce give you anxiety?

Worry no more.

crmCopilot is an AI assistant purpose-built to support front-office teams by taking care of tedious tasks and delivering proactive insights:

-- Automated CRM Updates: crmCopilot intelligently detects when your CRM needs attention, drafting precise and timely updates that you can approve with a single click - transforming hours of manual data entry into mere seconds.

-- Task Management: crmCopilot proactively identifies your next steps, important follow-ups, and critical tasks. It continuously tracks deadlines and action items, ensuring nothing is forgotten or overlooked.

-- Global Search: Quickly find crucial information across all your emails, CRM data, calendar events, call recordings, documents, and notes, all from a single, intuitive search interface. No more time wasted hunting down important details.

crmCopilot customers close more deals and build stronger relationships. You’ll spend more time with customers, never miss a task or opportunity, and walk into every meeting fully prepared with every customer interaction at your fingertips. 

Give Salesforce the AI upgrade it deserves. Try crmCopilot today.
one_liner: Give Salesforce the AI upgrade it deserves

name: FINNY AI
long_description:
FINNY is the AI-native organic growth engine for financial advisors, focused on helping them grow their practices
 
Our goal is to empower financial advisors to reach the right potential clients at the right time, with the right message.  We are building a world where anyone who wants financial advice can connect with the right advisor, while helping advisors ensure organic growth, the most existential problem advisors face. 
                                                                                                                                                      
The organic growth process has historically been highly inefficient and full of noise. Advisors often waste 60+ hours of business development to convert 1 new client.  

At FINNY, we are certain we can do better with AI. With our tool, advisors can:
- Identify prospects within their target niche, aggregating thousands of data points per lead
- Prioritize prospects based on their predicted likelihood of converting using F-Score, a score unique to each advisor and prospect pair
- Automate the outreach and meeting scheduling with their high priority prospects

In essence, FINNY does all the rote work for the advisors, letting them focus on what actually matters: the client relationship.
one_liner: The organic growth engine for financial advisors

name: OpenFunnel
long_description:
OpenFunnel is the Search Engine for GTM.

Searching for "B2B SaaS, 501-1000 employees, uses Salesforce" - is just targeted spam.

Even if you get creative with LLMs to query these databases, everyone has access to the same commoditized databases, these databases lack insights about right timing or pain-points prospects face.

OpenFunnel is a time-aware search engine for insights and activities in your target segment - that reveal pain.

You can search for activities like:
"Find companies looking to implement usage based billing"
"Find companies that moved from OpenAI to self-hosted models in the last 3-6 months"
"Find companies who updated their pricing page to introduce an enterprise plan in the last 3 months"

OpenFunnel continuously monitors these time-based signals, delivering actionable insights daily - so you have the fastest, unique insights that your competitors miss out on.
Over 1000+ users are already discovering prospects through pain-first search, including some of the fastest-growing companies like Central, Mintlify, and Everest Systems.
one_liner: We monitor your TAM and surface companies when custom triggers fire.

name: Verbiflow
long_description: Research on autopilot. Discover, Qualify & Engage your market.
one_liner: People search that works

name: Peppr AI
long_description: Peppr makes the sales call itself the enablement surface. Our real-time overlay listens to customer conversations, surfaces approved answers to technical questions instantly, and suggests discovery questions to deepen signal - all grounded in your company's existing knowledge across 150+ enterprise tools. Reps stop deferring, messaging stays consistent, and enablement teams finally get visibility into where live conversations break down.
one_liner: In-call AI teleprompter that helps reps close enterprise deals

name: Cedar
long_description:
Cedar helps the fastest growing GTM teams ramp up new reps faster & spread top rep playbook throughout the team. AE's at Cursor, Corgi, Pylon, and Warp use Cedar to save 75% of admin time on CRM updates, follow-ups, and deal strategy. 

Backed by YC with an ex-Figma, Notion, and Intuit team, Cedar was built by spending hundreds of hours with the best AE's in industry – we've built a playbook for the fastest growing teams and founders ramping up sales, and we'll use it to automate the busy work so you can sell more, better.
one_liner: Execute the best sales playbook in industry

name: Nomi
long_description:
Nomi.so provides on-the-spot phrase suggestions, intelligently crafted from your transcribed sales calls and a custom playbook that adapts and grows with you, from founder-led sales to revops mastery. 

PS: We also increase closing rates by 12% on average and free up your sales team's mental energy.
one_liner: Realtime Sales Copilot

name: Golpo
long_description:
Golpo AI is the world's best platform to create fully produced whiteboard explainer videos from just a prompt or document. Instead of hiring an agency, you simply input a prompt or document explaining what you want, and in minutes you get a whiteboard explainer video in a style similar to Khan Academy or RSA Animate. After creation, you have the ability to edit all aspects of the video with just prompts. 

It's perfect for training, faceless YouTube, marketing, technical, and educational videos — any video where understanding is important. Trusted by over 90,000 users, Golpo features include but are not limited to: 

1) Convert your narration into an explainer video (with your narration as audio and the video time aligned) 
2) Input your document or prompt. Document can be of virtually any format or type (text, audio, video etc.) 
3) Script-to-video with matching audio
4) Videos up to 10 minutes
5) 50+ languages
6) dead-simple editing after generation
7) Insert your own videos and images into the generation, used as-is without alteration.
8) 10+ visuals styles, including pen in hand, voice cloning, vertical video, custom branding and more! API access available.
one_liner: Create Whiteboard Explainer Videos with AI from a Prompt or Document

name: Eden
long_description: Eden helps companies generate realistic, high fidelity synthetic data on demand. We simulate customer data, product activity, and edge cases so sales engineers can run live demos without using production data or spending hours hand-building demo accounts.
one_liner: Synthetic data + simulators for sales demos

name: Regbase
one_liner: Tracking global laws, grants and consultations

name: Pulsent
long_description:
Pulsent continuously watches how your users and interacts with your product and engages them at the right moment to convert, upsell, and retain. 

As companies scale, founders, account managers and customer success teams can only take care of a small fraction of users. The rest receive generic, annoying and poorly timed communication. Opportunities are missed, customers churn, and revenue is lost.

The core problem is that user behavior is fragmented across tools like PostHog, Stripe, Salesforce, etc., making it impossible to understand users in real time. We unify all data into a single view and let AI agents act on top. This only recently became possible with advances in visual AI (dec ‘25), allowing agents to watch sessions and understand behavior at human or better level.

Pulsent detects expansion and churn signals, prioritizes high-value accounts, and executes through AI agents across channels like email, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp. It increases conversion and reduces churn without adding headcount.

We already have paying customers, process hundreds of millions of events daily, and are seeing strong demand from PLG B2B Clients. Nicolò is an ex-BCG who has scaled two startups to millions in ARR. Arseniy worked for several years at Datadog handling billions of datapoints. We’ve worked together for 3+ years and experienced this problem firsthand in our previous startup.
one_liner: AI Agents that watch, engage and convert your users.

name: Drip
long_description: We build the way for you to create context for all your communications, finances, and inbound.
one_liner: The company brain
